description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to the registry. Define a single build stage. Add a build job that runs on all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that runs only on master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Add a test job that also runs on all branches except master, uses the golang:alpine image, runs a before_script that installs git via apk --no-cache add git, sets OLDPATH=$(readlink -f ..) and SOURCE=/go/src/gitlab.com/gitlab-micro/listen, creates the source directory, moves the code, then runs go get -v ./..., go test -v -cover -tags test ./..., and finally restores the original directory. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
